title: Savory Buckwheat Cakes with Galaktoboureko Salsa
description: A fusion of Thai flavors and Greek inspiration, these savory buckwheat cakes are served with a tangy galaktoboureko salsa for a unique and delicious snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together buckwheat flour and savory cheese.
In a separate bowl, whisk together oozy egg and soy sauce.
Add the egg mixture to the buckwheat mixture and stir until combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Meanwhile, mix together crumbled galaktoboureko pastry, roasted red pepper, greek yogurt, and green onion in a bowl.
Serve the buckwheat cakes with the galaktoboureko salsa.
